candidate.name: <full name>
candidate.title: <professional title, e.g. data analyst, phd researcher>

summary: <professional summary, profile, or objective - verbatim, translated to English>

education.degree: <qualification in English: BSc, MSc, PhD, Diploma, vocational training (Ausbildung), Meister, state-certified technician...>
education.year: <graduation year, or expected year for current students>

publications: <title, venue, year - one string per paper or article>

languages.proficiency: <level exactly as stated: native, fluent, C1, B2, intermediate...>

skills: <canonical lowercase skill, e.g. python, kubernetes, machine learning>
certifications: <certification, professional license (IHK, Approbation, driving class...), or completed course>
